sections.title: 1. What data we process
paragraphs: LocalTools only handles the minimum data needed to run locally and keep basic security.
items: Local preferences: language, theme, density, and selected tool stored in localStorage.
Basic browser technical data required to render the app.

sections.title: 2. Why we use this information
paragraphs: Local information is used only to preserve your experience on your device. It is not used for advertising profiles or cross-site tracking.

sections.title: 3. Cookies and local storage
paragraphs: LocalTools does not use analytics cookies or advertising cookies.
A technical hosting cookie may exist to serve the correct deployed version.

sections.title: 4. Providers and external links
paragraphs: The app may include external links (for example, support links). External sites have their own privacy policies.

sections.title: 5. Security
paragraphs: We apply reasonable technical measures to reduce unauthorized access or code tampering risks.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
items: Request information about data processing when applicable.
Request correction or deletion when legally applicable.
File a complaint with the competent authority.

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For legal questions or reports, use the contact channel in the footer.

sections.title: 8. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy for technical or legal reasons. The current version is always published with date.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: By using LocalTools you accept these terms. If you disagree, stop using the site.

sections.title: 2. Permitted use
items: No illegal use, abusive automation, or unauthorized access attempts.

sections.title: 3. User-submitted content
paragraphs: If you submit suggestions or feedback, you declare you have rights to share that content.

sections.title: 4. Third-party links
paragraphs: We do not control external linked sites and do not guarantee their availability or safety.

sections.title: 5. Security and availability
paragraphs: We apply reasonable safeguards, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted service or zero incidents.

sections.title: 6. Warranty disclaimer
paragraphs: The service is provided "as is" and "as available", within the limits of applicable law.

sections.title: 7. Service changes
paragraphs: We may update features or these terms at any time. Continued use means acceptance of the current version.

sections.title: 8. Governing law and contact
paragraphs: These terms are interpreted under the applicable law of the project owner and mandatory consumer rules.
